title: ork-rubric/1.0
description: Machine-readable rubric contract shared across grading skills (verify, assess, review-pr). Dimension weights MUST sum to 1.0 (+/- 0.001) — enforced by tests/skills/structure/test-rubric-schema.sh, not expressible in JSON Schema. Scores are on a 0-10 scale. min_blocker semantics: a dimension score below min_blocker is a hard blocker regardless of composite. min_pass semantics: a dimension (or composite) score below min_pass fails the gate. (#2347)

skill.description: Skill this rubric belongs to (directory name under src/skills/).

description.description: Human-readable summary of what this rubric grades and how.

source.description: Pointer to the prose reference this rubric was transcribed from (kept canonical for humans).

min_pass.description: Weighted composite score below this value fails the gate.

streak_target.description: Optional default for the streak gate (verify/references/streak-gate.md): require N consecutive READY-FOR-MERGE verifications before declaring done. N >= 2 (1 would be identical to single-shot verify). An explicit --streak=N flag always overrides this. Declared here so a configured target is schema-validated rather than silently ignored (#2557).

weight.description: Contribution to the weighted composite. All weights in a rubric must sum to 1.0 (+/- 0.001).

min_pass.description: Dimension score below this value fails the gate (soft floor).

min_blocker.description: Dimension score below this value is a hard blocker regardless of composite. Must be <= min_pass when both are present.
